title: rubus strictus
intro: Rubus strictus, also known as the South African Mountain Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus strictus include the ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin irritations. Rubus strictus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
